title: Tidal Charting Hull: EEF reviewer-session brief created
body: Created .agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/eef-plan-reviewers.codex-brief.md for the next Codex session. It requires docs-adr-expert, general type-expert, and a separate special type-preservation type-expert pass focused on preserving EEF as-const type information through raw corpus -> typed raw foundation -> graph-native view -> graph ops -> MCP schemas/results -> teacher value proof. Targeted markdownlint and Prettier are green.
